mapper.select: SELECT id, request_user, status, category_id, GET_CODE_NAME('onetoone_cate', category_id) AS categoryName, inquery_title, inquery_content, response_user, response_content, response_date, response_inquery, score, create_date, create_id, modified_date, modified_id FROM tb_csm_one_to_one_inquiry WHERE 1=1 AND display_yn = 'Y' AND request_user = #{requestUser} ORDER BY create_date DESC

SELECT id, request_user, status, category_id, GET_CODE_NAME('onetoone_cate', category_id) AS categoryName, inquery_title, inquery_content, response_user, response_content, response_date, response_inquery, score, create_date, create_id, modified_date, modified_id FROM tb_csm_one_to_one_inquiry WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_csm_one_to_one_inquiry SET request_user = COALESCE(#{requestUser} , request_user), status = COALESCE(#{status} , status), category_id = COALESCE(#{categoryId} , category_id), inquery_title = COALESCE(#{inqueryTitle} , inquery_title), inquery_content = COALESCE(#{inqueryContent} , inquery_content), response_user = COALESCE(#{responseUser} , response_user), response_content = COALESCE(#{responseContent} , response_content), response_inquery = COALESCE(#{responseInquery} , response_inquery), score = COALESCE(#{score} , score), modified_id = COALESCE(#{modifiedId} , modified_id) WHERE id = #{id}
